text.title: llm-decision-framework Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llm-decision-framework as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Recommending RAFT (RAG + fine-tuning hybrid) as the first option for a new feature.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: RAFT requires continuous retraining infrastructure most teams lack. It is theoretically optimal but operationally fragile. Start with RAG alone; add fine-tuning only when RAG alone cannot meet the accuracy bar after tuning.

failure-mode.description: Choosing RAFT for a customer support chatbot with 500 articles.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: RAG alone meets all requirements at 1/10th the cost. RAFT adds fine-tuning infrastructure, retraining cycles, and operational complexity with no accuracy benefit when the knowledge base is small and well-structured.
